geographic_restrictions: Pennsylvania, specifically within the Chesapeake Bay Watershed and Most Effective Basins (MEBs)
project_area: Agricultural projects requiring technical support for implementation
demographic_requirements: Projects must be located within the Chesapeake Bay Watershed and Most Effective Basins (MEBs) in Pennsylvania
eligibility_summary: Open to Pennsylvania County Conservation Districts for agricultural projects in designated watersheds. Provides technical support to move projects from planning to implementation.
